title: Primus Labs
description: Primus (formerly "PADO") is a trust, verification and privacy layer designed for crypto and agent economy. The core technologies are zkTLS and zkFHE.  zkTLS builds on the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol by adding zero-knowledge proofs, so you can verify data authenticity without revealing the data itself. zkFHE takes this a step further, ensuring computations on encrypted data are secure and tamper-proof, even when outsourced.
